creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, I'm getting these errors on CURRENT on an AX211. The kernel is GENERIC except for a acpi-wmi patch.

I've uploaded boot dmesg to:

https://people.freebsd.org/~ziaee/dmesg.20250224

and after `service netif restart`:

https://people.freebsd.org/~ziaee/dmesg.20250224.after.netif.restart

Thank so much for everything you do!
